heading: Fee for transcript of record
label: 7284 Fee for transcript of record
text: The Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims may fix a fee, not in excess of the fee authorized by law to be charged and collected therefor by the clerks of the district courts, for comparing, or for preparing and comparing, a transcript of the record of any proceeding before the Court, or for copying any record, entry, or other paper and the comparison and certification thereof.
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims” for “Court of Veterans Appeals”.Pub. L. 105–3681991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4084 of this title

Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first month beginning more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 105–368section 513 of Pub. L. 105–368section 7251 of this titleNov. 11, 1998
